calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-295 liking-bridge GoalState seeding strengthening (490c-FAIL successor: upstream-gate branch)
items.note: Successor to V3-EXQ-490c FAIL on C2 with bridge_n_cue_fires_total ~0 (upstream gate blocking the bridge). Lowers mech295_min_drive_to_fire and mech295_min_z_goal_norm_to_fire and raises drive_to_liking_gain to verify whether activation floors were silencing the bridge. claim_ids = ['Q-040'] only -- the relaxation is a config probe, not a standalone test of MECH-295's weak reading. experiment_purpose=evidence for architectural Q-040b.
